title: No "Java Edition" text on title screen
description: Because Java Edition is the real Minecraft!
body:
Very Self Explanitory


The title screen logo only has MINECRAFT instead of MINECRAFT: JAVA EDITION

![screenshot in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SxVa6sxT/images/c11b4ce57b746ce20309134f9ca3c909a7c603d0.png)

Below is a screenshot of how it looks WITHOUT the texture pack ![How the logo looks without the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6865462c90c7ff92fc9ff4b77699341f8c025f40.png)
